description: Plugin-distributed hooks for construction-general-contractor. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks on install. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: flags GC anti-patterns (markup/margin confusion, undated labor rates, verbal change orders, schedules with no critical-path logic). Set CONSTRUCTION_GC_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
